Text: No kings! No crowns!\n Power to the people now!
Books not bans!\n Knowledge for all lands!
No kings! No crowns!\n Freedom rising all around!
Not our voice! Not our choice!\n Hear the people raise their voice!
Whose Streets?\n Our Streets!
Show me what Democracy looks like.\n This is what Democracy looks like!
Love. Not hate.\n That’s what makes America great.
When ___ is under attack, what do we do?\n Stand up, Fight back.
No Kings. No Crowns.\n We the people won’t back down.
Donald Trump is full of shit.\n He’s a white supremacist!
We are mad! We are pissed!\n Trump is on the Epstein list!
No more ICE, no deportation!\n All are welcome in our nation!
One struggle, one fight!\n Immigrants’ rights are human rights!
Immigrants rights, trans rights,\n same struggle, same fight!
No Tyrants! No Kings!\n These are not American things.
Tiny hands, tiny feet,\n he's a pedophile we must impeach!
Ain't no power like the power of the people,\n 'cause the power of the people don't stop
One, two, three, four – we won't take it anymore!\n Five, six, seven, eight – organize, agitate!
No hate, No fear,\n ICE is not welcome here.
Up, up with liberation!\n Down, down with deportation!
Every city, every town!\n Stop ICE, shut it down!
Not another nickel, not another dime!\n No more funding for ICE crimes!
No hate. No fear.\n Immigrants are welcome here.
If the people are united,\n The regime will be indicted!
When kings arise, we organize!
No justice. No peace. No justice. No peace.\n If we don’t get no justice. You don’t get no peace.
No Trump. No ICE.\n No KKK. No fascist USA
Education not deportation!
The people, united,\n will never be defeated.
Chinga la migra
